scripts.deploy:prod:
echo '
✗ Direct wrangler deploy --env production INTERDIT. Use:
  python -m Apps.the-play-button.tpb-cock.agent.scripts.tpb_cli --target production deploy-release-train deploy lms
or:
  python -m Apps.the-play-button.tpb-cock.agent.scripts.tpb_cli promote worker lms --to production' && exit 1
